title: Mechatronics
outline: The course aims to provide a unified and holistic view of automation of mechanical systems. Specific topics are: Multibody Kinematics (2D&3D), Inverse Kinematics, Euler -Lagrange Mechanics, Numerical Simulation, Friction modelling and a selection of nonlinear control topics from: Feedback Linearisation, Lyapunov Stability, Sliding Control, Gain Scheduling, Manipulator control and Trajectory Optimisation. Applications of techniques will be tailored towards terrestrial, sea, air as well as industrial robotic s ystems. The course aims to develop knowledge, skills and values through a balanced integration of lectures, laboratory and project work.
lecture_times: See departmental timetable and official class schedule.
